title: SurgeMultiplier
description: A dynamic pricing factor applied during periods of high demand that increases base fares proportionally to balance supply and demand.

multiplierValue.description: The surge multiplier value (e.g. 1.5 for 1.5x surge)

validUntil.description: Timestamp until which the surge multiplier is active

reason.description: Reason for the surge (e.g. HIGH_DEMAND, SPECIAL_EVENT)

geofenceRef.description: Geographic area where the surge pricing applies

title.description: Title or label of this price component

tags.description: Tags associated with this price component
